recommendations.title: Le Notti Bianche
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged man meets a young woman who is waiting on a canal bridge for her lover's return.

recommendations.title: Rocco and His Brothers
recommendations.overview: When a impoverished widow’s family moves to the big city, two of her five sons become romantic rivals with deadly results.

recommendations.title: The Innocent
recommendations.overview: Tullio Hermil is a chauvinist aristocrat who flaunts his mistress to his wife, but when he believes she has been unfaithful he becomes enamored of her again.

recommendations.title: Obsession
recommendations.overview: Gino, a drifter, begins an affair with inn-owner Giovanna as they plan to get rid of her older husband.

recommendations.title: La Terra Trema
recommendations.overview: In rural Sicily, the fishermen live at the mercy of the greedy wholesalers. One family risks everything to buy their own boat and operate independently.

recommendations.title: Bellissima
recommendations.overview: Film director Blasetti is looking for a little girl for his new movie. Along with other mothers, Maddelena takes her daughter to Cinecittà, hoping she’ll be selected and become a star. She is ready to sacrifice anything for little Maria.

recommendations.title: Senso
recommendations.overview: A troubled and neurotic Italian Countess betrays her entire country for a self-destructive love affair with an Austrian Lieutenant.

recommendations.title: The Damned
recommendations.overview: In the early days of Nazi Germany, a powerful noble family must adjust to life under the new dictatorship regime.

recommendations.title: The Leopard
recommendations.overview: As Garibaldi's troops begin the unification of Italy in the 1860s, an aristocratic Sicilian family grudgingly adapts to the sweeping social changes undermining their way of life. Proud but pragmatic Prince Don Fabrizio Salina allows his war hero neph

recommendations.title: Death in Venice
recommendations.overview: Composer Gustav von Aschenbach travels to Venice for health reasons. There, he becomes obsessed with the stunning beauty of an adolescent Polish boy named Tadzio who is staying with his family at the same Grand Hôtel des Bains on the Lido as Aschenba
